title: Cherry Vanilla
body:
# The All-in-one Modpack for Minecraft!
Includes all of the important mods that people usually download. It's inconvient for someone to download a modpack, only for it to not have every mod they need. This modpack (hopefully) should have everything that people want or need. 

Below are some questions you may want to know about.

## What this modpack about?
See this video for more details.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bDjdu07b8rk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Why did you make this modpack?
Personally, I just get tired of having to download mods everytime I make/download an instance, and it's more convient for me (and you) to have everything in one modpack. I think it would be convient for others to get the best out of the box experience with one single modpack, and if you are the kind of person that likes minimal modpacks, that's fine, i'm not going to get mad.

## Whats Included?
- Optimization mods (sodium, C2ME, entity culling, ect)
- Iris Shaders
- QOL mods (jade, dynamic lighting, axiom, ect)
- Resourcify for downloading resource packs, shaders, and more

## Who's behind this?

My team, and the mod developers. They're pretty cool.

## Can you make more modpacks? I like this one!

I'm planning on it, not sure when it'll come out

## How can I send feedback?

Contact me on discord (cherriigrove), or join my discord (look in the community section) for any additional additions or changes to be made to the modpack, and contact the developers of the mods for changes to them.

## Community

[Discord](https://discord.gg/heWKcyVfzp) (for support and community chat)

[Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/cherrigrove) (to support me)
